title: The Hunting Wives: 2025's Top Trending TV Show on Google
text: Netflix's thriller series The Hunting Wives topped Google's 2025 trending TV search list, surpassing shows like The White Lotus, The Pitt, The Summer I Turned Pretty, and Squid Game. The show stars Brittany Snow as Sophie O'Neill, who relocates to East Texas and befriends the wealthy, hedonistic Margo Banks played by Malin Akerman. When a local cheerleader is murdered, Sophie becomes the prime suspect, launching a dangerous cat-and-mouse dynamic between the two women. Google's Year in Search tracked trending searches—terms with the highest traffic increases between January and November 2025 compared to the previous year, rather than most-searched terms. The show's success stems from amplifying popular thriller tropes. The series unapologetically explores female desire and queerness, which generated both acclaim and controversy. Netflix renewed the show for season 2 in September after resolving licensing complications.
